violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth or sanitizer solution for wiping food spills was not clean. Cloth with sani spray and degreaser spray bottles were visibly soiled/dingy.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Ice machine has yellow debris buildup at bottom edge of interior panel.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
